mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0
a.deleted = 0
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND a.status = #{status}
ORDER BY a.id DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0
a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0
a.deleted = 0 AND a.author_id = #{authorId}
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.author_id = #{authorId} AND a.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.content_html AS contentHtml, a.status, a.review_status AS reviewStatus, a.review_comment AS reviewComment, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, a.submitted_at AS submittedAt, a.reviewer_name AS reviewerName, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.author_id AS authorId, u.display_name AS authorDisplayName, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a.author_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE a.slug = #{slug} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' LIMIT 1
